old_value: {"id":"smallhold-8xq","title":"Config parsing (config.toml via serde+toml)","description":"Implement config.toml parsing using serde and toml crates. Config struct mirrors the spec exactly: [server] listen/domain/secret_key, [storage] database_path/media_dir, [federation] user_agent/timeouts/concurrency/authorized_fetch, [limits] max_post_chars/max_attachments/max_media_mb, [defaults] visibility/sensitive/language.","design":"No 'config' crate, no 'figment'. Just serde + toml. Arc\u003cConfig\u003e shared across handlers via axum State. Validate secret_key length at startup.","acceptance_criteria":"Config loads from file path given via --config flag or default path; missing required fields produce a clear error message; secret_key is validated as 64 hex chars; config is passed as Arc\u003cConfig\u003e through the app","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:58:17Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:58:17Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-6sk","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:19Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
